interpretation.TN: Unanswerable question — system correctly said not found
interpretation.FP: System answered when it shouldn't have, or answered wrongly
interpretation.FN: Answerable question — system missed it (said not found)

per_question.question: What is self-plagiarism?
per_question.expected: Submission of the same academic work more than once without prior permission of the instructor
per_question.got:
Hi there! I'm happy to help you with your question about campus life.

Self-plagiarism refers to the act of using someone else's work or ideas without properly crediting them. This can include copying and pasting text from one source into another, or passing off someone else's research as your own.
